scripts.nx:unlock: nx daemon --stop 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf .nx/workspace-data .nx/cache && echo 'Nx daemon stopped and cache cleared.'
scripts.build:all: yarn build:rules && yarn build:paper && yarn build:double-eighteen && yarn build:double-eighteen-react && yarn build:engine && yarn build:react && yarn build:theme && yarn build:bridge && yarn build:functions
scripts.build:all:hosting: yarn build:all && yarn build:leaderboard && yarn build:ops
scripts.build:libs: yarn build:double-eighteen && yarn build:double-eighteen-react && yarn build:engine && yarn build:react && yarn build:theme
scripts.test:engine:slow: vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-rating-calibration.spec.ts src/lib/ai/ai-weight-optimizer.spec.ts src/lib/ai/module-calibration.spec.ts
scripts.calibrate:ai-tei: AI_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-rating-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints a calibration"
scripts.calibrate:ai-tei-dti: AI_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 AI_CALIBRATION_DROP_TO_IMPULSE=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-rating-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints a calibration"
scripts.calibrate:modules: MODULE_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts --reporter=verbose src/lib/ai/module-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints module calibration"
scripts.calibrate:modules:quick: MODULE_CALIBRATION_GAMES=100 MODULE_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts --reporter=verbose src/lib/ai/module-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints module calibration"
scripts.calibrate:modules:dot: MODULE_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts --reporter=dot src/lib/ai/module-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints module calibration"
scripts.optimize:ai-weights: AI_WEIGHT_OPTIMIZE=1 AI_OPTIMIZER_PARALLEL=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-weight-optimizer.spec.ts -t "prints optimizer"
scripts.test:libs: yarn test:engine && yarn test:react && yarn test:tei-core && yarn test:functions
scripts.test:~all: yarn test:engine && yarn test:react && yarn test:tei-core && yarn test:functions && yarn test:bridge && yarn test:leaderboard && yarn test:engine:slow && node scripts/check-firebase-fn-rewrites.mjs
scripts.test:all: yarn test:~all && yarn test:functions:emulator && yarn test:e2e && yarn test:e2e:leaderboard && yarn test:e2e:firebase
scripts.pack:double-eighteen-react: yarn build:double-eighteen && yarn build:double-eighteen-react && (cd vendor/double-eighteen-react && npm pack --dry-run)
scripts.pack:libs: yarn build:libs && yarn pack:engine && yarn pack:react && yarn pack:theme
scripts.publish:all: bash scripts/npm-publish-otp.sh vendor/double-eighteen && bash scripts/npm-publish-otp.sh vendor/double-eighteen-react && bash scripts/publish-warp12-libs.sh
scripts.deploy:hosting:ops: yarn build:ops && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/firebase-with-env.sh deploy --only hosting:ops
scripts.class1-star:pipeline: yarn class1-star:collect && yarn class1-star:train && yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:deep: yarn class1-star:collect && yarn class1-star:train:deep && yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:deepblue: yarn class1-star:collect:rl && yarn class1-star:train:deepblue && CLASS1_STAR_BENCH_GAMES=500 yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:go-out: CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out CLASS1_STAR_OUT=tools/nn/data/trajectories-go-out.jsonl yarn class1-star:collect && tools/nn/.venv/bin/python tools/nn/train.py --data tools/nn/data/trajectories-go-out.jsonl --loss combined --weight-scheme outcome --alpha 1.5 && CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out jiti tools/nn/bench-class1-star.ts
scripts.fleet-admiral:bench:go-out-4p:500: AI_BENCH_PARALLEL=1 FLEET_BENCH_GAMES=500 CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out CLASS1_STAR_PLAYERS=4 jiti tools/nn/bench-fleet-admiral.ts
scripts.omega:pipeline: yarn omega:collect && yarn omega:train && yarn omega:bench
scripts.omega:iterate: yarn omega:collect && yarn omega:train:warm && yarn omega:bench
scripts.tauri:android:dev: bash scripts/inject-android-manifest.sh && cd apps/Warp12 && tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:build: bash scripts/inject-android-manifest.sh && cd apps/Warp12 && tauri android build
scripts.deploy:hosting:bridge: yarn build:all && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/firebase-with-env.sh deploy --only hosting:bridge
scripts.deploy:hosting:leaderboard: yarn build:leaderboard && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/firebase-with-env.sh deploy --only hosting:leaderboard
scripts.deploy:hosting: node scripts/check-firebase-fn-rewrites.mjs && yarn build:all:hosting && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/firebase-with-env.sh deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:firebase: yarn build:all:hosting && yarn workspace @warp12/functions build && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/deploy-functions.sh && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/firebase-with-env.sh deploy --only firestore,hosting
scripts.auth:all: firebase login --reauth && gcloud auth login && /usr/bin/env bash -lc '. scripts/lib/warp-env.sh && warp_env_load deploy && warp_env_validate deploy && gcloud config set project "$FIREBASE_PROJECT"' && npm login
